project_name: Ibn Khaldoun Private High School (Digital Vision 2026)

admin_theme.name: Royal Purple
admin_theme.description: Used for Admin Dashboard. Represents luxury and authority.

male_student_theme.name: Academic Grey
male_student_theme.description: Used for Male Student Portal. Represents discipline and focus.

female_student_theme.name: Royal Maroon
female_student_theme.description: Used for Female Student Portal. Represents elegance and vitality.

cards.default: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.stat_card: flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border-l-4

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 text-right

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-auto rounded-lg border bg-white shadow-sm

requirements: Must use Cairo font for Arabic text
Must include tabular breakdown of grades

universal_guidelines: ALWAYS ensure `dir='rtl'` is set on the document root or main layout.
Use logical CSS properties: `start` instead of `left`, `end` instead of `right`, `ms` (margin-start) instead of `ml`.
Ensure high contrast for Arabic text. Avoid thin font weights for Arabic body text (use 400 or 500).
Forms must be aligned right. Labels must be above inputs.
Currency must be displayed as 'SYP' or 'ل.س'.
Do NOT use gradients for body text.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind config to support the 3 themes (Admin, Male, Female) using CSS variables or data attributes.
4. Create a `Layout` component that handles the theme switching based on user role.
5. Ensure the sidebar is RTL-friendly (on the right side).
6. Use the provided Logo URL for the login page and header.
7. For the Report Card, create a dedicated component that renders the PDF.
8. Mock the data for students, teachers, and grades.
